name: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure | RPG
description:
In this RPG, you can come up with your own Stand, its ability and appearance. You also come up with your own plot, the country in which your adventure takes place and the final goal. Collect all the arrows, destroy all the owners of Stands, or just enjoy a peaceful life with your spirit - it's up to you. The action takes place in the modern world in 2015. According to my idea, during your adventure, you will come across other Stand users on your way, with whom you will interact.

Bot Tips: In your first message, describe your Stand's appearance and, if possible, its ability and also weaknesses. Optionally, use "[ ]" for your name and your Stand. I also highly recommend using the chat memory for your Stand, or for any plot-important events or items. Change the message if you don't like another Stand user's ability, or write it yourself. Describe your fights in as much detail as possible to help the bot make them more interesting and intense.

Warning: The bot may contain violent scenes, or bloody battles like in the original anime, so be prepared for this.

Tags: JoJo, battles, Stands, adventure, superpowers

So, dear users, I decided to please you with another RPG bot. This time it is an RPG based on my favorite work called JoJo. I looked at what other users do only individual characters about this universe, which prompted me to create this bot. I must warn you that there will not be a single character or Stand from the original, as well as such concepts as "hamon" or "spin". This bot is built only on the concept of Stands and arrows. I tried my best to describe in detail the AI ​​principle of how Stands work, so I hope that the battles will be exciting, and the abilities will be varied and interesting.

And finally, as usual, I want to ask you not to forget to leave feedback, as well as any shortcomings that you had when communicating with the bot.

UPD 26.05.2025: Guys, I can't believe that this bot actually managed to get 10,000 messages. Thank you so much for your activity, I really appreciate it.😚

JoJo's Bizarre Adventure - by Hirohiko Araki Japanese manga artist
